TEXT: Arcanum Universal Setup for UAP Mod. This mod is a collection of files that makes the game run on modern operating systems with minimal loads and stutters. Mod was adapted to utilize core resolutions to cover every possible Screen. Mod combine most reliable solutions we know of today. Mod Should increase scrolling speed thru the maps as well as provide stable FPS in most areas of the game
Considerate Weapon Mod. Firearms, Throwing Weapons and Grenades are awesome, but balanced badly. Mode fixes balance
Let my Dog use the Train Mod. A simple mod that provides alternative dialogue for dog owners allowing them to board the train with the dog. Works in mage caboose
Arcanum Crafting Manuals Cover Mod. Mod change Manual Icons to indicate Manual skill

Arcanum Improved Descriptions(AID) Mod. Mod covers description for all the items in main Campaign and some of the side modules. Also complex weapons and armors description reworked to be less complex but contain all the vital data. Improved texts reveal multiple hidden quirks and mechanics
